name: Beirir
bio:
Physical Appearance: Nord male. Wears common middle-class clothing: a quilted doublet with tan linens and a pair of doeskin shoes. Armed with an iron longsword.
Race: Nord
Personality Keywords: peaceful, communal, loyal
Role: Beirir is a savant and member of the Ulfgar clan living in the small community of Bleaker's Way, where the Ulfgar and Dalvilu clans reside peacefully side by side.
Home Location Information: The Ulfgar Family's House in the western part of Bleaker's Way.
Daily Routine: Beirir sleeps from midnight to 6am. Upon waking, he spends two hours eating breakfast with fellow clan member Ulrika Ulfgar. After some wandering inside the house, he leaves at 10am and heads to the Bleaker's Way Goodwill Inn, where he relaxes for four hours and occasionally chats with innkeeper Kirsten. At 2pm, he returns to the Ulfgar Family's House and spends the rest of the day there until bedtime at midnight.
Clan Loyalty: If Beirir learns that the Dalvilu clan is responsible for the murder of clan leader Hrol Ulfgar, he will join the massed combat between the two families and fight to the death. If he survives the battle, he will return to his regular schedule.
Personality - The Clan Member: Beirir lives a quiet, communal life as part of the Ulfgar clan. He spends his time with fellow clan members and at the village inn. His willingness to fight when his clan leader is murdered demonstrates his loyalty to the Ulfgar family.
author: Bethesda
